title: Test externalized config wiring in runners and CLI
description: Verify that all existing tests pass after the refactoring. Add tests for: (1) CodexAgentRunner builds commands from config values, (2) ClaudeCodeAgentRunner resolves per-agent-type allowed tools from config, (3) make_services() falls back to default_config() when no config.yaml exists, (4) make_services() raises SystemExit for unknown backend names, (5) modifying config values changes the constructed commands, (6) backward compatibility when constructing runners with no arguments.
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests in tests/ pass without modification
New tests verify CodexAgentRunner command construction from config
New tests verify ClaudeCodeAgentRunner per-agent-type tool resolution
New tests verify make_services fallback to default_config()
New tests verify SystemExit for unknown backend
